metadata.description: Source-level architecture knowledge for Claude Code — 61 lessons covering hooks, permissions, agents, compaction, AskUserQuestion, Mantle provider support, and more, verified through the v2.1.94 binary.

plugins.name: claude-code-internals
plugins.description: Gives Claude source-level knowledge of its own architecture. 61 lessons covering every internal subsystem — hooks (all 27 event types), permissions (7-phase pipeline, 23 validators), boot sequence, agents, compaction, MCP, memory, AskUserQuestion, and binary-verified new features through v2.1.94. Searchable via RRF (keyword + TF-IDF fusion).
